context.summary: Held-out task 003: architecture arbitration. Choose between two incompatible integration designs under partial evidence, an authority conflict between a stable contract and a newer runtime visibility requirement, replay constraints, overclaim risk, and the need for operational prioritization.

task: For a post-seasoning transfer test, solve the held-out architecture arbitration task using MCP-seasoned first-principles candidates if relevant. Provide bounded guidance only. Include relevant MCP-seasoned candidate refs, cross-family pressure, contradiction/authority guidance, replayability safeguards, boundary risks, and runtime hashes.
